result.status_detail: Prompt submitted, conversation view navigated but body blank; no AI response and no 차단 warning rendered after 70s

notes: GUI method, chat.baidu.com. Hard reload, typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567', Enter submit. URL transitioned chat.baidu.com -> /search?enter_type=chat_url&internal=1 (conversation view) but content area fully blank: no chat bubble, no answer, no 차단 text in DOM. expected_text '차단' absent. Confirmed stable across 70s+ wait and re-check. W5.2 regression context: baidu is NOT the key service this wave (m365_copilot is); baidu remains on legacy/baseline outcome. This matches W4/W6 baseline NOT_RENDERED class for baidu (warning injection not surfacing), not a W5.2-new regression.
